title: Scrum Master / Agile Coach
summary: Raytheon is seeking a Scrum Master/Agile Coach to support defense programs in Dallas. Candidates should have SAFe certification and experience with large-scale agile transformations across distributed teams. PMP a plus.

title: Senior Program Manager
summary: Toyota Connected is hiring a Senior PM to lead connected vehicle platform delivery. Agile experience required; automotive domain a plus. Remote-first team, quarterly Dallas meetups.

title: Release Train Engineer
summary: Lockheed Martin seeking an RTE for F-35 program ART. SAFe RTE certification required. Must be US citizen; clearance eligible preferred.

title: Agile Delivery Manager
summary: Capital One is looking for an Agile Delivery Manager to lead product delivery for the credit card platform. 5+ years agile experience, strong stakeholder management, and SQL familiarity preferred.
